PROP-baseauction-inv-010.text: On auction end, remaining auctioned asset must be returned to feeAggregator and assetOut forwarded to receiver.
PROP-baseauction-inv-010.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd: assetBalance>0 => transfer(asset, feeAgg); outBalance>0 => transfer(out, receiver)

locations.note: Base implementation handles residual asset transfer to feeAggregator and assetOut to receiver
Override in deployed concrete contract; may modify end behavior
